title: nepeta betonicifolia subsp. somkhetica
intro: Nepeta betonicifolia subsp. somkhetica, also known as Somkhetica catmint, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Somkhetica catmint include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Somkhetica catmint can be prepared as a herbal tea, infused oil, or dried extract, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in various forms of traditional medicine.
